# Week 10

## Materials

📕 [Class slides]({{< var spring-week10-class-slides >}})

📗 [MEDS Computational Server Offboarding]({{< var computational-server-offboarding >}})

💭 [In-class team reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411B >}})

## Surveys

🗂 [UCSB 411B Course Evaluation](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb) **: Please fill it out!**

🗂 [Capstone Advisor Evaluation]({{< var advisor-evaluations >}}) **: Required for completing the course.**

## Schedule

<!-- 12:30 - 12:45 : Final Presentations Check-in

12:45 - 1:00 : Remaining deadlines

1:00 - 1:15 : GitHub releases

1:15 - 1:30 : Secure Copy Protocol (SCP) demo - Kat Le, Bren School

1:30 - 2:20 : Co-working

2:20 - 2:40 : Capstone Wrap-up: individual and team reflection

2:40 - 3:30 : Snacks and surveys! 😋 -->


## Upcoming deadlines

{{< include _spring_deadlines_tables.qmd >}}

<div id="table-week10"></div>


## To do by Friday, June 6

### 1. 🌱 Complete Personal Reflection 2 & Self/Peer evaluation

**Due when?** Due on {{< var final-academic-delierables-deadline >}}.

**How to submit:** Upload the two documents **as PDFs** to [this Box folder]({{< var reflection-2-box-folder-411B >}}). Make sure you use the following file names:

1. `YourGroupAlias_Firstname_Lastname_411B_CapstoneReflection2.pdf`
2. `YourGroupAlias_Firstname_Lastname_411B_SelfPeerEvaluation2.pdf`

**You must also email your peer evaluation directly to your faculty advisor.**

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

Please complete the following two documents:

1. [[TEMPLATE] Personal Reflection 1 – 411B]({{< var personal-reflection-2-411B >}})
2. [[TEMPLATE] Peer and Self Evaluation - Mid quarter 411B]({{< var peer-and-self-evaluation-endofquarter >}})

Detailed instructions are included in the templates.

This is an individual assignment. Each team member is responsible for submitting their own reflection and submitting it to the Box folder.

**If you would like to set up a meeting with me (Carmen) to chat about anything, please send me a Slack message and we can find a time that works.**

</details>

<br>


### 2. 📥 Submit final Technical Documentation, signature page, and GitHub repository

**Due when?** Due on {{< var final-academic-delierables-deadline >}}.

**How to submit:**  Upload final version of the TD and signature page **as a PDFs** to [this shared Box folder]({{< var final-TDs-box >}}). 

1. `YourGroupAlias_TechnicalDocumentation.pdf`
2. `YourGroupAlias_TD_SingaturePage.pdf`

<details>
<summary>**Instructions**</summary>

- Your faculty advisor must have approved it and signed before submitting it.
- Collect signature from your advisor (first), then me. DocuSign might be the easiest way to do this.
- You will need to upload two *separate* files for your TD:
    1. The final version of your TD with a blank signature page in PDF format with your Capstone Project short name 
    2. The signature page in PDF format.

</details>

<br>

### 3. 📧 Send your final documentation, GitHub repository, and deliverables to your client 

**Due when?** Due on {{< var final-academic-delierables-deadline >}}.

**How to submit:**  Send your project documents, deliverables, and a link to your GitHub repository to your client. Thank them for their guidance and collaboration on this project!

<br>

### 4. 🗂 Complete Faculty Advisor Evaluation and Course Surveys

**Due when?** Due on {{< var final-academic-delierables-deadline >}}.

**How to submit:** Complete the surveys through the links.

Thank you completing these! Your feedback really helps to improve the capstone courses!

1. [UCSB Course Evaluation](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb)

3. [Capstone Advisor Evaluation]({{< var advisor-evaluations >}}): part of your MEDS academic final deliverables.

<br>


## Congratulations on Finishing Your Capstone Projects!

![](/411b_spring/images/commencement.png)
